expectations.text: Constructs JQL with project = DO, type = Bug, priority in High/Highest, status = Blocked
expectations.evidence: Uses DO project as instructed (original assertion referenced placeholder project name). Uses 'project = DO' instead of 'project = PLATFORM'. The JQL does include 'issuetype = Bug AND priority IN (Highest, High) AND (status = Blocked OR status = "On Hold")' but the wrong project key.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs search with the JQL query
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'node .../jira.mjs search "project = DO AND issuetype = Bug AND priority IN (Highest, High) AND (status = Blocked OR status = "On Hold") AND resolution = Unresolved ORDER BY priority ASC, updated DESC" --max 50'

expectations.text: Mentions presenting results with key, summary, assignee, and last updated
expectations.evidence: Expected Output section: 'A list of blocked high-priority bugs showing for each: Issue key (e.g., DO-456), Summary, Status, Priority, Assignee (display name or "Unassigned"), Updated (last update timestamp)'
